opportunities.acquisition_channel: x402 Bazaar listing and automated marketplace search
opportunities.expected_outcome: First verified dollar from a paid call to the published endpoint
opportunities.intended_buyer: agent builders and workflow automation users seeking reasoning API endpoints

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 qualified contacts produce no replies.

opportunities.name: Publish and monetize a reasoning-capable agent endpoint on x402 Bazaar
opportunities.next_executable_action: Draft a public validation brief for a reasoning agent endpoint targeting x402 Bazaar buyers
opportunities.offer: A functional reasoning agent endpoint published on x402 Bazaar, priced per call, with usage metering and documentation. Outcome: First paid call from a unique payer.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot the offer when qualified replies do not start checkout.

score_adjustments: Free-substitute resilience was capped because at least three substitutes were identified.
opportunities.thesis: x402 Bazaar shows strong verified payer activity (10,718 unique payers over 30d). Reasoning-capable endpoints are present in GitHub Models catalog. New endpoints can attract paid calls if they solve agent workflow pain or boost productivity.

opportunities.acquisition_channel: Public publishing (GitHub Pages); indirect discovery via catalog links and GitHub workflows
opportunities.expected_outcome: First inbound request or payment for agent endpoint supply brief
opportunities.intended_buyer: agent builders, workflow buyers, integrators, ecosystem operators

kill_criteria.reason: Kill after 25 qualified contacts produce no replies.

opportunities.name: Provide a public superbrief for agent endpoint supply, targeting ecosystem buyers
opportunities.next_executable_action: Publish a public superbrief summarizing agent endpoint supply for ecosystem buyers
opportunities.offer: Concise, actionable brief summarizing agent endpoint supply, differentiation, and buyer fit. Outcome: Discovery by ecosystem buyers, contact, or request for consult.

pivot_criteria.reason: Pivot the offer when qualified replies do not start checkout.

score_adjustments: Demand and first-dollar scores were capped because cited sources did not contain a direct demand signal.
Free-substitute resilience was capped because at least three substitutes were identified.
opportunities.thesis: Official MCP Registry and GitHub Models catalog show high supply of agent endpoints and growing buyer interest. Buyers need summarizing briefs to vet and compare new endpoints.

selected_execution.reason: x402 Bazaar has verified high payer activity, direct native payment, and agent endpoint monetization fit. Publishing a public brief allows validation without dependencies, supports rapid iteration, and can attract real buyers for reasoning agent endpoints.
